description: If the Websets evaluation adopts monitors or webhooks, implement callback authentication, timestamp tolerance, replay protection, payload size limits, schema validation, event idempotency, and durable dead-letter handling before enabling production callbacks. Acceptance: forged, stale, replayed, oversized, malformed, duplicate, and valid callbacks are tested. Close as not applicable with the adoption decision if callbacks are deferred.
title: Secure Exa Websets callback ingestion
